name: Tee Box Clearfield
address: 340 W 1700 S Suite B101, Clearfield, UT 84015
about: Tee Box Clearfield is an indoor golf simulator facility focused on comprehensive golf improvement programs. The venue uses advanced TrackMan technology for data-driven swing analysis and practice, providing a professional-grade training environment. Memberships appear to be the primary access model, with options including fitness and nutritional coaching alongside simulator access. The facility is open 24 hours and caters to golfers seeking structured improvement through technology, coaching, and community engagement.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology provides precise swing data for targeted improvement
Full-time personal coaching creates a structured path to game enhancement
24-hour access offers maximum flexibility for practice schedules
Integrated fitness and nutrition programs support holistic athlete development
Inclusive community environment fosters growth and social engagement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service, but nutrition coaching is available

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar and camera system for precise club and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility offers club fittings and rentals, but members can use their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, but BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A 30-minute Box Assessment is claimed to be comparable to 90 minutes on the course, but typical 18-hole simulator time varies.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box offers youth programs and creates an inclusive environment for junior golfers.
